title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
summary: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
summary: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
summary: Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget in a few months, some companies

title: Blockchain.com deepens onchain stock offerings as tokenized equities market grows
summary: The rollout in collaboration with Ondo Finance broadens access to tokenized traditional assets as demand for onchain stocks and ETFs continues to grow.

title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
summary: French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight  — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.

title: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition
summary: Anthropic has joined the Frontier coalition, which received another $915M in pledges to fund carbon removal projects.

title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
summary: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

title: SpaceX alum nabs $22M to turn rocket engines into geothermal power plants
summary: Critical Energy is turning rocket engines into geothermal power plants, and it wants to build 300 GW per year by 2045.

title: Inveniam to acquire Mantra after turbulent year marked by OM crash
summary: Inveniam announced plans to acquire Mantra, a blockchain project that spent the past year recovering from the collapse of its OM token and prolonged market pressure.

title: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030
summary: The DeFi token is up 20% in a day, with a Standard Chartered note and Uniswap's tokenized-stock launch fueling fresh demand.

title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
summary: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.
